benefits.title: Why Parents Love AITuition

benefits.b2.title: 11 Indian Languages

benefits.b3.title: Age-Appropriate Teaching

benefits.b6.title: Parent Dashboard

about.title: About AITuition
about.body: AITuition was built by a team of Indian educators and engineers who believe every child deserves quality education — regardless of location or budget. Our AI tutor Niche Tutor follows official board syllabi, teaches in your child's language, and adapts to their pace.
about.aim.title: Our Aim
about.aim.body: To make personalised tuition as easy as opening an app — so any parent in India can give their child the best possible education from the comfort of home.
pricing.title: Simple, Honest Pricing
pricing.pro.desc: Everything in Basic + weekend doubt clearing
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Is AITuition suitable for very young children like LKG?
faq.a1: Yes! For LKG and UKG, our AI tutor uses songs, stories, rhymes and play-based learning in simple language. Parents should sit alongside for the best experience with young learners.
faq.a2: CBSE, ICSE, and Odia Medium (State Board) are fully supported with official syllabus structures. More boards like West Bengal and Maharashtra are coming soon.
faq.q3: How does the 7-day free trial work?
faq.a3: After registering, you get 7 full days of access — no credit card required. You can complete real lessons and quizzes. On day 8, choose a Basic or Pro plan to continue.
faq.q4: What if my school has a different chapter order?
faq.a4: No problem! During setup, you can either pick a pre-defined syllabus or paste your own chapter list — the AI will create a customised plan based on exactly your chapters.
faq.q5: In which languages can my child study?
faq.a5: All 11 Indian languages: English, Hindi, Odia, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu, Marathi, Kannada, Gujarati, Malayalam, and Urdu. Switch language anytime from the top navigation.
faq.q6: How accurate is the AI tutor?
faq.a6: Our AI follows standard board syllabi closely and provides accurate, curriculum-aligned content. Every lesson ends with: 'Please verify with your child's textbook and teacher.' We recommend using it alongside — not instead of — school education.
faq.q7: Can one account be used for multiple children?
faq.a7: Yes! You can create separate study plans for each child within one account. Each plan tracks its own progress, streak, and quiz history independently.
faq.q8: What are the weekend doubt sessions?
faq.a8: Pro plan subscribers get Saturday and Sunday doubt-clearing sessions. Type any question from the week's topics and get an instant, detailed AI explanation in your chosen language.
